entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by the millet head miner in the Sahel region.

entities.name: MILLET HEAD MINER
entities.description: An insect pest, Heliocheilus albipunctella, that attacks pearl millet.

entities.name: HABROBRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: A parasitoid wasp used as a biological control agent against the millet head miner.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the biological control process was implemented.

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The geographical region where the millet head miner is a main insect pest.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The large-scale process of releasing parasitoids to manage pest populations.

entities.name: MILLET YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of pearl millet, which increased due to parasitoid release.

entities.name: PARASITISM RATE
entities.description: The rate of parasitism on millet head miner larvae.

entities.name: LARVAE MORTALITY RATE
entities.description: The rate at which millet head miner larvae die.
